=== GPTQ Experiments - opt-350m ===

=== FP16 Baseline ===

ptb : 26.079631805419922
c4 : 20.714584350585938

=== RTN 4-bit ===

ptb : 31.118545532226562
c4 : 23.936708450317383

=== GPTQ 4-bit ===

ptb : 28.376829147338867
c4 : 28.487892150878906

ptb : 35.02398681640625
